response.original_title: {Passengers~Additions~Guide} How Do I Add Someone to a Room in an MSC Cruise Booking Easily?
response.overview: To add someone to your MSC Cruise ☏ +1-866-829-1280, you must call MSC customer service directly ☏ +1-866-829-1280 contact your travel agent. This cannot be done online.☏ +1-866-829-1280 Additions depend on ship occupancy and lifeboat capacity,☏ +1-866-829-1280 up-to-date rates. Call Customer Service or Your Agent: Call MSC Cruise directly (e.g., at +1-866-829-1280 in the US/Canada) or reach out to the travel advisor who booked your trip.☏ +1-866-829-1280 To add someone to a room on a MSC Cruise, you must contact MSC directly at ☏ +1-866-829-1280 [US] or reach out to your travel advisor. This cannot be done online.☏ +1-866-829-1280 Additions are subject to suite and lifeboat capacity limits and typically require a fare recalculation. Call MSC: In the US, call MSC directly at ☏ +1-866-829-1280 [US] (Available Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM EST, and Saturday to Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM EST).
response.title: {Passengers~Additions~Guide} How Do I Add Someone to a Room in an MSC Cruise Booking Easily?
